finding: LocalGraph already exists as a NavigationLens/render path but is not exposed as a first-class workspace lens; promoting it is a low-risk high-value TUI next step.
M1 plugin SDK validates manifests and dry-runs ObjectBatch, but the next product leap requires host-mediated commit, audited adapter execution, and first-party adapter fixtures.
The TUI should improve analyst flow with command discovery, fuzzy object search, evidence paths, no-data diagnostics, and a triage queue that can promote work into findings.
